name: Kettle
effect: This card is uncomfortably warm to the touch.

name: Iron
effect: This card is far heavier when held. When put away it returns to the weight of card. It always behaves as if it were made of card.

name: Flagon
effect: A large amount of liquid can be held on the card without it dripping off. The card is waterproof.

name: Worm
effect: Fish and birds are unusually attracted to this card.

name: Coin
effect: The card glimmers in the light, like a fine jewel.

name: Knife
effect: The sides of the card are very sharp, still bends like card.

name: Pen
effect: Draws a thin line when rubbed on a surface.

name: Dice
effect: When drawn a random number is displayed on the card.

name: Book
effect: This card shows a sentence of the last book the holder has read.

name: Pepper
effect: Storing this card with meat makes it taste better.

name: Arrow
effect: This card travels in a straight path when thrown.

name: Bandage
effect: This card sticks to the skin.

name: Boot
effect: The card slowly moves west.

name: Coat
effect: The card never gathers dirt nor gets wet.

name: Pitchfork
effect: The card smells exceptionally bad.

name: Basket
effect: Any object balanced on the card feels nearly weightless.

name: Fork
effect: Small objects stick to the edge of the card.

name: Cloth
effect: This card slowly absorbs liquids.

name: Eyeglass
effect: The card bends slightly at one corner, pointing to the nearest 'interesting' thing.

name: Mirror
effect: After 5 hours of the card remaining undamaged, a copy appears. (this card does not dissolve)
